jsonld.name: Aesthetic Metric Conflict
jsonld.description: Navigating aesthetic judgment when structural quality indicators provide contradictory signals — high novelty but low coherence, strong emotional valence but weak imagery — creating uncertainty about overall aesthetic success that can't be resolved through the proxy metrics themselves.
